title: Create AutonomousAgent: full plan → execute → observe → adjust loop
completion_summary: Implemented AutonomousAgent with plan→execute→observe→adjust loop using taskDecomposer and toolExecutor
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/types.ts (AgentState, AgentObservation, ProactiveSuggestion types from subtask 14)
acceptance_criteria: AutonomousAgent class with private state, plan, observations fields
run(input, mode): Promise<AutonomousAgentResult> — full autonomous loop entry point
plan(input): Promise<AgentPlan> — uses LLM to create execution plan
executeStep(step: AgentStep): Promise<ToolResult> — runs step via ToolExecutor or LLM
observe(step, result): Promise<AgentObservation> — LLM assesses result, decides if adjustment needed
adjust(observation): Promise<AgentPlan> — modifies plan based on observation
Main loop: plan → for each step: execute → observe → if needsAdjustment: adjust and continue
Tracks state transitions through all AgentState values
Handles max iterations (prevent infinite loops, default 10)
